nasb.text: In every city of Judah he made high places to burn incense to other gods, and provoked the Lord, the God of his fathers, to anger.

esv.text: In every city of Judah he made high places to make offerings to other gods, provoking to anger the Lord, the God of his fathers.

cnv.text: 他又在猶大各城建造邱壇，向別的神燒香，惹怒他列祖的　神。

ccb.text: 他还在犹大各城建立丘坛，向其他神明烧香，惹他祖先的上帝耶和华发怒。
